name: Astral Projection
description: Project consciousness from the body to observe remote locations in the physical world.

name: Automatic Writing
description: Enter a trance state and channel information from spirits or the subconscious through automatic writing.

name: Channeling
description: Allow a spirit or ghost to temporarily speak and act through your body.

name: Clairvoyance
description: See and hear events at a remote location as they happen in real time.

name: Death Sight
description: Perceive the exact manner and circumstances of a person's death by touching them or their remains.

name: Dowsing
description: Detect nearby sources of water, minerals, or other specific substances through psychic sensitivity.

name: Dream Travel
prerequisites: Astral Projection ●●●, Mind Reading ●●●, Thought Projection ●●●
description: Enter the Temenos and other dream realms, navigating the landscape of collective and individual consciousness.

name: Ghost-Calling
description: Call a specific known ghost to manifest before you, compelling its presence through psychic force.

name: Postcognition
description: See echoes of past events that occurred at a location, reading the psychic residue left behind.

name: Precognition
description: Experience visions of potential future events, though the future remains mutable.

name: Psychometry
description: Read the psychic impressions and emotional history left on physical objects by their owners.

name: Animal Empathy
description: Psychically sense the emotional state, needs, and desires of nearby animals.

name: Animal Possession
description: Inhabit and control the body of an animal, experiencing the world through its senses.

name: Animal Rapport
description: Communicate directly with animals in a limited fashion, exchanging basic concepts and emotions.

name: Aura Reading
description: See the psychic auras surrounding living beings, revealing their emotional states and supernatural nature.

name: Biokinesis
description: Manipulate biological processes — your own or others' — through concentrated psychic focus.

name: Cryokinesis
description: Generate and control cold and ice through psychic power, lowering temperatures or forming ice structures.

name: Mental Blast
description: Deal lethal mental damage to a target's mind through concentrated psychic assault.

name: Mind Breaker
description: Permanently damage a target's mental faculties, leaving lasting psychological harm.

name: Mind Control
description: Seize control of a target's actions, overriding their will with your own psychic commands.

name: Mind Reading
description: Read surface thoughts or delve into deeper memories of nearby people.

name: Plant Empathy
description: Psychically sense the slow awareness and vitality of nearby plant life.

name: Psychic Empathy
description: Deeply feel and manipulate another's emotions through direct psychic contact.

name: Psychic Healing
description: Accelerate the healing of wounds and disease through concentrated psychic focus directed at the body.

name: Psychic Illusions
description: Create vivid sensory illusions that affect all five senses of those around you.

name: Psychic Invisibility
description: Make yourself invisible to those around you by suppressing your presence in their minds.

name: Psychic Vampirism
description: Drain life force or Willpower from nearby people, sustaining yourself at their expense.

name: Pyrokinesis
description: Create fire from nothing and hurl it at targets through pure psychic force.

name: Pyrokinetic Immunity
description: Develop resistance to heat and fire damage through psychic attunement to flame.

name: Pyrokinetic Shaping
description: Shape and control existing fire, directing its movement and form through psychic command.

name: Telekinesis
description: Move objects with the power of the mind, from small nudges to hurling large objects at speed.

name: Telepathic Communication
description: Send and receive complex messages, concepts, and emotions mentally across distances.

name: Telepathic Rapport
description: Establish a surface-level mental link with another willing person, sharing basic thoughts.

name: Thermokinesis
description: Generate and control heat through psychic power, warming objects or people with focused intent.

name: Thought Projection
description: Project thoughts, memories, and sensations directly into other minds without their consent.

name: Alchemy (External)
description: Transform physical substances through ritual alchemical processes, achieving effects beyond mundane chemistry.

name: Alchemy (Internal)
description: Refine the spirit and mind through meditation, breathwork, and internal alchemical discipline.

name: Communion
description: Connect consciousness to powerful spiritual beings, entities, or forces to receive wisdom and guidance.

name: Countermagic
description: Detect and defend against the workings of other thaumaturges, unraveling hostile ritual effects.

name: Curse of Ill-Fortune
description: Lay a targeted curse of misfortune, removing dice from the victim's pools for specific actions.

name: Divination
description: Perform ritual readings — tarot, I Ching, entrails — to divine the future or reveal information about a target.

name: Dream
description: Gain insight through dreams into primordial forces and hidden truths, accessing knowledge otherwise unavailable.

name: Dream Travel
description: Enter a sleeping person's dreams while in a trance, observing and interacting with their subconscious.

name: Enchantment
description: Control and perceive others' emotions through sympathetic magic, ritual, and focused will.

name: Evocation
description: Compel a spirit or ghost to answer your summons and provide information or service.

name: Familiar
description: Form a magical bond with a spirit in Twilight, gaining a loyal supernatural companion and advisor.

name: Favorable Fortune
description: Generate a highly directed and powerful turn of good luck for yourself or an ally.

name: Geomancy
description: Harmonize an environment with natural energy flow through ritual design and placement.

name: Healing
description: Channel magical energy to heal wounds and cure disease through ritual laying on of hands.

name: Invocation
description: Request the presence of spirits or ghosts through ritual plea, offerings, and sacred words.

name: Library
description: A personal collection of occult tomes and reference works, granting bonuses to research and ritual preparation.

name: Longevity
description: Prevent aging through alchemical elixirs, extending natural life far beyond its normal span.

name: Luck Magic
description: Control chance and bend luck for specific tasks, adding or removing dice from rolls through ritual.

name: Magical Nexus
description: A location imbued with power; rituals performed here receive bonuses from the concentrated energy.

name: Psychic Projection
description: Project your mind into the Twilight realm, gaining an intangible form that can interact with spirits.

name: Sacrifice
description: Trained in ritual sacrifices that provide Essence or sustenance to spirits in exchange for favor.

name: Scrying
description: View distant locations through scrying devices — mirrors, bowls of water, crystal balls — in real time.

name: Second Sight
description: Perceive the spiritual realm by sight and sound, seeing spirits and ghosts in Twilight without a trance.

name: See Auras
description: Open your perceptions to read psychic auras, discerning emotional states and supernatural nature.

name: See Spirits
description: Automatically notice spirits from the Shadow Realm that manifest in Twilight.

name: Soul Jar
description: Trap a dying person's soul in a prepared physical container, preventing it from passing on.

name: Spring
description: Sense and draw forth water from the earth, locate hidden springs, and purify contaminated water sources.

name: Visionary Trances
description: Enter a ritual trance state to see and communicate with beings from the Shadow Realm.

name: Warding
description: Erect a magical barrier that prevents ghosts and spirits from entering a designated area.

name: Weather Control
description: Control local weather patterns in a minor way, calling rain, dispersing fog, or stirring winds.
